rationale: Gov't Code §2306.225 governs loan-to-cost ratios and amortization periods for federally insured housing development loans. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 2306.225. RATIO OF LOAN TO DEVELOPMENT COST; AMORTIZATION PERIOD.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed change.
